positive: A highly detailed, ornate botanical tapestry centered composition. Depict a stylized fusion of rainforest fauna (hummingbirds, jungle leaves, coiled serpents) intertwined with celestial elements (crescent moons, shooting stars, constellations). The style should be Neo-Victorian Bohemian etching mixed with detailed Zentangle patterns. Use strong, elegant silhouettes and clean, graphic lines. The color palette must be limited to deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream white, creating high contrast against the negative space. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed to function as a repeating and impactful seamless print pattern suitable for apparel.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, jpeg artifacts, messy, low detail, grain, grayscale
